plan_metadata.name: Sample Da Ristorante Api Remote Debug

steps.description: Type text: 'Browse the menu ' into the search input field located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the blue "Create" button in the "Samples" tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface within Visual Studio Code. Add ${{var:app_name:Welcome}} in to env.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: python

```python
import json
import re
from pathlib import Path

file_path = '/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/da-ristorante-api/.vscode/launch.json'
if not Path(file_path).exists():
    print(f"File not found: {file_path}")
    exit(1)

with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

pattern = r'https://www\.office\.com/chat\?auth=2'
replacement = 'https://m365.cloud.microsoft/chat/entity1-d870f6cd-4aa5-4d42-9626-ab690c041429/${agent-hint}?auth=2&developerMode=Basic'

new_content = re.sub(pattern, replacement, content)

if new_content != content:
    with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(new_content)
    print('File updated successfully.')
else:
    print('No changes made: pattern not found.')
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
File updated successfully.

✓ Script executed successfully

steps.description:
@code open json file `/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/da-ristorante-api/.vscode/launch.json`, Update the json file.
Replace all places:
`https://www.office.com/chat?auth=2`
With:
`https://m365.cloud.microsoft/chat/entity1-d870f6cd-4aa5-4d42-9626-ab690c041429/${agent-hint}?auth=2&developerMode=Basic`
Preserve all formatting.
Press the F1 key in Visual Studio Code to open the Command Palette, interacting with the top navigation interface for executing commands or accessing features.
Type the text "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" into the Visual Studio Code command palette input field at the top center of the application interface.
Press Enter to select the highlighted "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" command in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Type the text "Preview in Copilot (Chrome)" into the command palette input box at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface to select the corresponding debug configuration.
Press the Enter key to select "Preview in Copilot (Chrome)" from the command palette dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Email or phone" input field within the Microsoft sign-in page in Google Chrome to set focus for entering credentials.

Click the "No" button on the Microsoft "Stay signed in?" prompt during login at login.microsoftonline.com within a Chrome browser window. The crosshair is positioned precisely over the "No" button, ensuring selection of the option to not stay signed in.
Reduce the zoom level of the Copilot Chat web interface in Microsoft Edge by pressing the keyboard shortcut Ctrl + - while focused on the main "Welcome to Copilot Chat" screen.
Click on the "Message Copilot" input box in the Il Ristorante chat interface within the M365 Copilot web application, positioning the cursor to start a new message.
Type "What's for lunch today?" into the chat input box of the "Il Ristorante" agent in the M365 Copilot Chat web interface, then click the send arrow button.
Press the Enter key to submit the "What's for lunch today?" text input in the Il Ristorante chat interface within the M365 Copilot web application.
Click the "Allow" button in the permission prompt for connecting to the Il Ristorante agent within the Chat | M365 Copilot web interface.
Click the "Always allow" button in the permission prompt for connecting to the Il Ristorante agent within the Chat | M365 Copilot web interface.
